repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type FIGHTER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 350 m/sec
      minimum_speed 150 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern OMNI_ANT
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern OMNI_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   track_processor track_proc WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
   end_track_processor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name escort_net
      internal_link track_proc
   end_comm
   weapon aim_120 WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      capacity 6
      reload_time 10 sec
   end_weapon
   processor task_mgr WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
      task escort
         target protected_asset
         radius 20 km
      end_task
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type TRANSPORT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name escort_net
      internal_link track_proc
   end_comm
   track_processor track_proc WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
   end_track_processor
end_platform_type

antenna_pattern OMNI_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 0 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 360 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 90 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform escort_1 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.60n 104.00e altitude 3500 m msl speed 220 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.20e altitude 3600 m msl speed 220 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform escort_2 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.60n 104.00e altitude 3500 m msl speed 220 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.20e altitude 3600 m msl speed 220 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform protected_asset TRANSPORT_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.58n 104.03e altitude 3400 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.78n 104.18e altitude 3400 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_1 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.95n 104.40e altitude 3600 m msl speed 200 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.20e altitude 3600 m msl speed 200 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_2 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.95n 104.40e altitude 3600 m msl speed 200 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.20e altitude 3600 m msl speed 200 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/escort_air_mission.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 420 sec
